title: Cloudbusting
description: A towering, expansive sky lands ready for exploration!
body:
Cloudbusting is a modpack that seeks to recreate the Minecraft world into a glorious sky world! Being the first project in my new "Miniature Modpacks" series, the cloudy skylands are brought to life with only 10 primary mods (as well as a bunch of performance/QoL mods but those don't count). The world generates in clusters of floating, towering islands, capable of generating all vanilla terrain and natural features. Peppered throughout this world are additional floating structures, giving players locations to find and explore. The pack also comes with 3 mods that add unique ways to traverse get around! And bridges! The entire pack is also thoughtfully tweaked and modified to add some visual flare, tying together the idea that this truly is a world in the clouds! Check out the video below showing the creation process!
Mods Included Bolded = One of the 10 major mods of the pack
